name: alpha_301_qualitycore_rev6_subind
expr: group_neutralize(add(multiply(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(ebit, assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), 252)), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252))), 0.7), multiply(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 6))), 0.3)), subindustry)

name: alpha_302_fcf_roe_rev9_ind
expr: group_neutralize(add(multiply(rank(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(cashflow_op, capex), assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(ebit, equity), 252), 252))), 0.65), multiply(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 9))), 0.35)), industry)

name: alpha_305_accrual_quality_rev7_subind
expr: group_neutralize(add(multiply(rank(add(reverse(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ebit, cashflow_op), assets), 252), 252)), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), 252))), 0.7), multiply(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 7))), 0.3)), subindustry)

name: alpha_306_debtdisc_quality_rev11_market
expr: add(multiply(group_neutralize(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252)), reverse(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(debt, assets), 252), 252)))), industry), 0.68), multiply(group_neutralize(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 11))), industry), 0.32))

name: alpha_307_tradegate_quality_reversal
expr: trade_when(rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(ebit, assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), 252)), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252))) > 0.58, group_neutralize(rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 8))), subindustry), rank(add(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(ebit, assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252), 252)), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252))) < 0.42)

name: alpha_308_rankmult_quality_rev12_subind
expr: group_neutralize(multiply(rank(add(ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(cashflow_op, capex), assets), 252), 252), ts_zscore(ts_backfill(divide(subtract(ts_backfill(fnd6_cptmfmq_saleq, 252), ts_backfill(cogs, 252)), assets), 252), 252))), rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 12)))), subindustry)
